svg.title: End-to-end RLHF data collection workflow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the six major phases of RLHF data collection: Strategy, Setup, Generation, Annotation, Processing, and Training, with an iteration loop back from training to generation.

g.text: Researcher defines data type (SFT, preference, red-team), evaluation dimensions
(helpfulness, safety, honesty), and target volume per iteration batch
Annotators interact with models, compare response pairs,
rate preference strength, label safety categories,

svg.text: This is not a one-shot pipeline. Both Anthropic and Meta ran this cycle weekly.
Each iteration uses the latest model to collect data, keeping the reward model
on-distribution. Anthropic ran 5+ weeks; Meta ran 14+ batches (RLHF V1→V5).
